item.title: Stealth Camping: Living at Wendy's for 24 Hours
item.description: A 24-hour stealth camping experience at Wendy’s is documented, showing the challenges and strategies involved in a safe and lighthearted way.

media:content.media:title: Stealth Camping: Living at Wendy's for 24 Hours
media:content.media:description: A 24-hour stealth camping experience at Wendy’s is documented, showing the challenges and strategies involved in a safe and lighthearted way.

item.title: What Did We Have At Buc-ee's Gas Station?

item.description: A recount of a stealth camping experience interrupted by a 911 call, highlighting the situation, response, and unexpected challenges faced.
